creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
Created attachment 245331
0001-net-p2p-sonarr-devel-Update-to-4.0.0.686.patch

While at it, also moved iconv to USES instead of RUN_DEPENDS like the other .NET *arr ports

poudriere ok
runs in production on my systems (13.2 amd64)

No URL with changes for sonarr.
Changes from the in-app releases page:

NEW:
* Year custom filter in Series Index

FIXED:
* Completed downloads in Qbit missing import path
* Only apply remote path mappings for completed items in Qbit
* SABnzbd history retention to allow at least 14 days
